subcodes.first_line: O pilgrim of the sacred Sepulchre! Praise God that thou hast traversed the seas and attained the shores of the ocean of bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر تربت مقدسه حمد کن خدا را که دریاها را قطع نمودی و بساحل بحر بخشش
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @being a source of light; guidance, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
